name: stock-backtest
description: 股票量化策略回测系统 - V1.1 多因子策略版
author: QuantX Developer
mainFeatures: Core backtesting engine with order matching and position management
Multiple data sources: CSV files, CSV directory, mock data, online APIs
Technical indicators: MA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands
Multiple strategies: MA Crossover, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, Multi-Factor
Online stock data fetching (NetEase, Sina, East Money, Tushare)
Auto-save fetched data to local CSV files
Data directory browser with file selection

techStack.dataFormat: CSV (date, open, high, low, close, volume)

commands.install: npm install && cd web && npm install
